dtsPropsFor.PageHero: eyebrow: string; title: string; variant?: "page" | "article"; children: React.ReactNode;
dtsPropsFor.CTA: /** Opens the WhatsApp chat already on-topic for a service page. */ service?: string;
dtsPropsFor.ArticleCard: /** Post metadata. `cover: null` falls back to the branded generated CoverArt. */ post: { slug: string; title: string; description: string; date: string; dateLabel: string; updated: string | null; updatedLabel: string | null; readTime: string; wordCount: number; pillar: "ai" | "automation" | "websites" | "seo-content" | "operations" | "case-studies"; pillarLabel: string; cover: string | null; coverAlt: string | null }; /** Heading level for the card title — h2 in a listing, h3 in a rail. */ titleAs?: "h2" | "h3";
